title: Night & Day Reflection Log
description: Track how your sleep affects your daytime functioning. Complete this each evening to connect last night's sleep with today's experience.
instructions: Reflect on last night's sleep and today's daytime experience. This log helps you see the connection between sleep quality and daily functioning.

fields.label: How would you rate last night's sleep?
Approximately how many hours did you sleep?
Morning mood when you woke up
Any physical symptoms today? (headache, fatigue, body aches)
fields.placeholder: e.g., Morning headache, afternoon fatigue, or leave blank

fields.label: What helped or hurt your sleep last night?
fields.placeholder: e.g., Reading before bed helped; late coffee made it harder

disclaimer: This reflection log is an educational self-tracking tool. If you have persistent sleep problems affecting daily functioning, consult a healthcare provider. If you are in crisis, call or text 988.
